violations.text: There was no evidence that employees are required to report to the person in charge information about their health (illnesses, symptoms) as they relate to diseases that are transmissible through food.Resource given to PIC. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/21/2025

Inspector observed an accumulation of trash, litter, and/or other debris in outside dumpster area and surrounding front area of establishment. Outside areas must be kept cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 07/21/2025
The outside dumpster is not covered. Receptacles and waste handling units for refuse, recyclables, and returnables shall be kept covered. New Violation. Correct By: 07/21/2025
The outside dumpster is not covered. Receptacles and waste handling units for refuse, recyclables, and returnables shall be kept covered. New Violation. Correct By: 07/21/2025

The floors in the back storage area have an accumulation of soil residue, food debris, and/or small accumalation of rodent droppings. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 07/21/2025

Hole observed near electrical box in back room. Opening observed on exterior of building by refuse area. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 07/14/2023

Excess of empty boxes and clutter observed in back room area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions for pests. Inventory in back room area was observed stored right against the wall. Inventory shall be stored 12 inches off wall in order to allow proper pest control access. New Violation. Correct By: 06/15/2023
